articles.title_en: United Russia lawmaker’s Telegram channel posts about a front-line ‘deadlock’ and coming ‘large-scale mobilization.’ He says ‘enemies’ stole his channel.

The post also addressed a fuel crisis in occupied Crimea caused by Ukrainian drone strikes.
